production_notes.stability: 0.55 keeps the voice consistent across the long sessions but allows enough variation that it doesn't sound robotic. Higher (0.7+) makes long sessions feel monotone.
production_notes.similarity_boost: 0.75 keeps strong fidelity to the original voice. Drop to 0.5 if voices start to sound thin.
production_notes.style: Low style (0.15) for the calm, non-performative tone we need. Do NOT raise above 0.3 for any sessions.
production_notes.every_script_uses_both_voices: Generate every script in BOTH voices. Storage cost is trivial. Users pick once at onboarding and can switch any time.
production_notes.pause_handling: ElevenLabs respects [PAUSE Xs] markers literally as silence. Verify on first-pass output.

audio_output_spec.rationale: Mono at 128kbps is plenty for spoken word, halves storage vs stereo, and downloads twice as fast on cellular.
